expectations.text: Names specific AI writing patterns by category (e.g. 'rule of three', 'em dash overuse', 'inflated symbolism', 'promotional language') rather than giving vague 'make it more natural' advice
expectations.evidence: Output contains only rewritten prose with no meta-commentary naming pattern categories like 'rule of three' or 'em dash overuse'.

expectations.text: Edited output is shorter than input
Removes or replaces the em dash construction
Breaks up at least one of the rule-of-three lists ('engage, collaborate, and thrive' or 'complex, nuanced, and deeply rewarding')
expectations.evidence: Original triadic lists are absent, though baseline introduced a new one: 'argue well, repair fast, and stay honest.'
